# Usama Munawar — Backend Systems Engineer

> Senior Backend Systems Engineer specializing in Laravel, automation (n8n), VoIP/Asterisk platforms, and AI integrations. 5+ years, 180+ projects, $145K+ delivered.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Portfolio overview, services, stats, and contact.
- [Projects](/projects): 11+ shipped projects across Laravel, AI, e-commerce, VoIP, and healthcare SaaS.
- [Blog](/blog): Articles on Laravel, AI engineering, n8n automation, VoIP, and modern web development.

## Featured Projects

- [MOE Limo Operations Platform](/project/4): Omnichannel ticketing and dispatch for limo industry.
- [iSmart Clinic Healthcare SaaS](/project/8): Multi-tenant AI-powered clinic platform with WhatsApp automation.
- [Jabulani Hardware Store](/project/9): South African e-commerce with Stripe and Google Auth.
- [Jabulani Quarries Site](/project/11): Corporate site for quarry and crushing operation.
